$comment: c82 D-CSUBSET-PARAM-ARRAY-ADJUSTMENT abstract-param corner (the sqlite3_vmprintf shape): a prototype's UNNAMED va_list param lands the SAME FnSig as the named definition (both resolution paths share ONE adjustment helper — pre-fix they drifted and the forward errored S0003 'got ap', witnessed on shell.c). va_list itself is EXCLUDED from the array->pointer adjustment (C 7.16: observable only via va_*/forwarding; the per-CC va_* machinery owns its passing — adjusting it SIGSEGV'd va_arg on SysV, witnessed on THIS example). Pins prototype==definition equality AND working va_arg reads through a double forward. sum(3,20,12,9)+1 = 42. gcc -std=c17 cross-checked (42).
